query:
SELECT 
  status_resumido,
  status_original,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) AS fase,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) AS status_judit,
  COUNT(*) AS qtd
FROM processos
GROUP BY status_resumido, status_original, fase, status_judit
ORDER BY status_resumido, qtd DESC;
command:

  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) AS fase,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) AS status_judit,
  COUNT(*) AS qtd
FROM processos
